original_test_expansion_scan.counting_rule: selected parents are not evaluable groups until boundary negatives are generated/reviewed, known-positive filtering is rerun, and support audit passes

ni_atomic_support_audit.detection: text prefilter containing 'Ni' followed by RDKit atomic number 28

active_repaired_beam_watcher.status_json_note: monitoring path is reused for active audit; status content points to repaired chunk manifest and repaired beam output dir
active_repaired_beam_watcher.beam_runner_header_fix: feeds Chemformer temporary no-header chunk inputs to prevent predicting the TSV header as an extra sample

evaluator_fix.description: hybrid scores under --allow-incomplete-groups are computed only on rows with both external and PC-CNG scores

score_calibration_20260715.paired_delta_note: paired deltas are computed on shared scored rows; full-beam rows without PC-CNG scores are not counted as hybrid gains
score_calibration_20260715.diagnostic_subgroup_signal: validation-selected subgroup hybrids can choose w>0 in small reaction-class subsets, but this is diagnostic only and not a predeclared held-out SOTA result

frozen_preheldout_recipe_audit.preheldout_decision: linear recipes fail validation Top-1; MLP improves validation Top-1 but fails repaired 25k test, so held-out 5k scoring remains deferred for these recipes

benchmark_results_20260714.interpretation: denominator scale complete, but PC-CNG underperforms Chemformer likelihood; no external SOTA claim

active_execution_status_audit.process_tree_check: last checked at 2026-07-13 17:53; watcher shells only had sleep 300 children; no hidden training or beam subprocess

active_queues.dependency: promoted from nbits8192 3-seed smoke after Test Top-1 >= 87.7%

active_queues.script: serial chain: run_v2_filtered_baseline_multiseed.sh -> run_v2_valtop1_ckpt_smoke.sh -> run_v2_representation_scale_smoke.sh -> run_v2_pairwise_margin_smoke.sh
active_queues.dependency: none; supersedes old sleep-only GPU5 watchers
selected from pairwise/margin smoke by Test Top-1 >= 87.7%
selected from pairwise/margin smoke by Test Top-1 >= 87.7%

promotion_gates.smoke_to_10seed: 3-seed mean test Top-1 >= 87.7% or predeclared compensating weak-class/external gain
promotion_gates.main_candidate: 10-seed original held-out Test Top-1 >= v2 + 1.0 pp and group-level ensemble CI entirely positive
promotion_gates.final_target: Original held-out Test Top-1 >= 93.0% or strict external Top-1 >= 90.0% with strong statistics
